input_coverage.pele_handling: Kept as null and excluded from v0 formula; no imputation.

checks.label: Fixture prediction coverage
checks.detail: 72/72 fixtures have one score prediction row; 72 unique fixture IDs.

checks.label: Team-fixture prediction coverage
checks.detail: 144/144 team-fixture views exist, with two views expected per fixture.

checks.label: Fixture references resolve
checks.detail: 0 fixture prediction rows reference a missing fixture.

checks.label: Team quality references resolve
checks.detail: 0 predicted fixture team slots are missing teamQuality rows.

checks.label: Team references resolve
checks.detail: 0 predicted fixture team slots are missing teams.json rows.

checks.label: Fixture probability bounds
checks.detail: 0 fixture probability fields are outside 0-1.

checks.label: Win/draw/loss probabilities sum to 1
checks.detail: 0 fixtures have win/draw/loss probabilities outside a 0.002 tolerance.

checks.label: Both-teams-to-score consistency
checks.detail: 0 fixtures have BTTS above either team's scoring probability.

checks.label: Expected goals are non-negative
checks.detail: 0 fixtures have negative expected goals.

checks.label: Expected-goals guardrail
checks.detail: 0 fixtures exceed the v0 guardrail of 4.0 team xG or 5.5 total xG.

checks.label: Favorite is consistent with win probabilities
checks.detail: 0 fixtures have favorite fields inconsistent with home/away win probabilities.

checks.label: Top scorelines are present
checks.detail: 0 fixtures are missing at least three positive-probability scorelines.

checks.label: Top scoreline guardrail
checks.detail: 0 fixtures have a top scoreline above 5 goals for one team.

checks.label: Elo input coverage
checks.detail: 48/48 teamQuality rows have World Football Elo values.

checks.label: FIFA ranking input coverage
checks.detail: 48/48 teamQuality rows have FIFA ranking; 48/48 have FIFA ranking points.

checks.label: PELE ratings are missing by design
checks.detail: 0/48 teamQuality rows have numeric PELE ratings. v0 keeps PELE as null and does not impute or backfill it.

checks.label: Team-view probability bounds
checks.detail: 0 team-fixture probability fields are outside 0-1.

checks.label: Team environment score bounds
checks.detail: 0 team-fixture environment score fields are outside 0-100.

checks.label: Player matchday projections include score context
checks.detail: 4017/4017 player-matchday rows have score-prediction context; 0 reference a missing score prediction.

checks.label: Player score-context bounds
checks.detail: 0 player-matchday score-context fields are outside v0 bounds.

checks.label: Fantasy matchday coverage
checks.detail: md1, md2, md3 found in score predictions; missing 0 expected matchday IDs.

caveats: This QA pass validates internal consistency and bounds; it does not prove predictive accuracy.
PELE ratings remain null because a reusable numeric table has not been imported.
The model still excludes final squads, injuries, official fantasy prices, official fantasy scoring rules, betting odds, and recent-form calibration.
Plain Poisson low-score calibration remains a v2 item.
fallback_rules: If any hard check fails, keep scorePrediction model status as prototype and do not use the affected fixture for advice without manual review.
If Elo or FIFA ranking is missing for a team, fall back to team_quality_v0 only and lower model confidence for that fixture.
If PELE remains unavailable, leave pele_rating null and do not fabricate a replacement.
If xG or probability bounds fail, clamp only for display safety and regenerate the source prediction before using it for recommendations.
